description: CompositionGrey and yellow striped pullover made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, has a ribbed V- neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and brand logo appliqued on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 30 degreesDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logoEnjoy the winter chill this year in this striped sweater from adidas. The long sleeves  adds to your masculine appeal, while the acrylic-wool fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day. Layer it over a T-shirt, jeans and sneakers for absolute comfort.Model statistics The model wears size M in pulloversHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
